form.formComment: Second-up. First start 5th of 7 at this track on October 12 over 1500m, on a slow track; 7 len behind Simply Best with 57kg at $7.20. Returned from break tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 7 at Lyon-la-Soie on March 11 over 2150m, 1.5 len behind Coco Vanille carrying 58kg at $7.50. Leading chance with plenty of upside.

form.formComment: Resuming after a six months break. Not seen since he finished last of 13 at Baden Baden October 17 over 1400m, soft track; 12 len behind Loucas carrying 56kg at $20.50. On debut third in a small field at Mulheim July 13 over 1300m, 5 len behind Voitton with 58kg at $5.10. Useful type who should go well.

form.formComment: Resuming after a five months break. Finished off last preparation third of 8 at Munich November 8 over 1600m, soft track; 2.75 len behind Waldemar carrying 57kg at $2.20. On debut fourth of 7 at Dusseldorf September 14 over 1400m, soft track; 3 len behind Avyaan carrying 56kg at $9.40. Has the talent to take this out.
